headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $140
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Shaun Kelley   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $150 to $140.
